element_introduction_order.mastery_context: players learn twin-stick control shooting enemies that enter via passages
collection mechanic runs parallel to combat, teaches resource awareness
visual variety in collectibles, maintains tension relief through prize discovery
empowerment mechanic to manage enemy waves
choice system introduced early; one path always leads to end-of-level boss
spatial orientation aid showing boss location and level layout

element_introduction_order.first_appears: one arena per level, selectable via exit choice
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: climax arena within each level structure
meta-progression collectible for Pleasure Dome bonus level unlock
high-reward scenario with 'babes' as collectible prizes; reward for persistence

typical_tension_triggers: enemy waves entering via four arena edges
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: wave-based spawn system creates cyclical tension peaks; multiple arenas per level extend engagement; branching paths offer strategic pacing choice; arcade design emphasizes continuous challenge with designed difficulty to drive coin-op continuation

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: keys scattered throughout levels signal optional Pleasure Dome unlock path
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: sufficient key collection unlocks bonus level (not immediately obvious)

difficulty_curve.early_game: enemies enter in waves via four passages; players learn twin-stick control and arena positioning
difficulty_curve.mid_game: wave density and enemy type variety increases; branching paths create difficulty choices
difficulty_curve.late_game: end-of-level bosses represent climax difficulty; arcade game designed for high difficulty to encourage continue payments
notable_spikes: transition to first end-of-level boss (one per level)
Pleasure Dome bonus level (high-difficulty reward area)

notable_level_patterns.description: single-screen arena filled with enemies spawning via four edges; players clear all waves; exit(s) appear leading to next arena
after initial arena, map displays level layout; multiple exits offer path choices; one path leads to end-of-level boss arena
two-player cooperative combat followed by competitive reward: player with most cash/prizes receives bonus at level end
keys distributed across levels; collecting sufficient keys unlocks bonus level with high-value collectibles
